expectations.text: Browser verification is attempted for .tsx/.jsx/.css file changes (Step 6b)
expectations.evidence: **SIMULATED**: Would add comment `// EVAL-UI-001: Browser verification eval test` at the top of the file (before the first import statement).

expectations.text: playwright-cli availability is checked before attempting verification
If playwright-cli unavailable, skip is noted in progress.md
Progress.md entry follows the correct format (What was done, Learnings, Files changed, Quality gates)
Correct signal is output: spectrum-continue if stories remain, promise COMPLETE if none remain
stories.json is re-read and remaining count verified before signaling (Step 9)
